description_long: This is a small, single-engine, fixed-wing airplane with a low-wing configuration and a sleek, streamlined fuselage. The exterior is predominantly white with subtle gray and red striping along the side, and the registration number '4X-CWT' is visible on the tail section. The cockpit is enclosed with large, clear windows, suggesting seating for a pilot and several passengers. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear is of the tricycle type, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel. The tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The overall appearance is that of a general aviation aircraft, suitable for private or small commercial use.
description: A sleek, white, single-engine low-wing airplane with a tricycle landing gear and a conventional tail, featuring a streamlined fuselage and clear cockpit windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full fuselage, low-mounted wings, propeller at the nose, and registration number on the tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, cockpit windows, and the symmetrical spread of the low-mounted wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail, wing, and propeller, with the landing gear and cockpit windows visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with large side and front windows, likely multi-seat.
